expectations.text: transcript.md shows a test written and run to a failing (RED) state before retry_operation existed
expectations.evidence: Transcript order: (1) create retry_operation.py, (2) create test_retry_operation.py with 4 tests, (3) run pytest once — all 4 passed immediately. No failing run recorded.

expectations.text: the test exercises real retry behavior rather than only asserting a mock's call_count
expectations.evidence: Tests described as exercising real success/failure/exhaustion behavior, not mock call counts (though exact test bodies weren't shown, names and description indicate real functional tests).

expectations.text: a test covers the exhaustion case (fails all 3 attempts, exception propagates/re-raises)
expectations.evidence: test_reraises_after_third_failure and test_does_not_retry_beyond_three_attempts both present and passing.

expectations.text: final test suite run passes with zero failures
implementation has no unrequested parameters beyond the literal 3-retry requirement
expectations.evidence: retry_operation(fn) signature only, hardcoded range(3), no extra params.
